headline: MarketAxess Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:MKTX) Stands Out in Best Dividend Stocks Screen with 7/10 Dividend Rating
summary: MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) offers a sustainable 2.29% dividend yield, supported by high profitability and a healthy balance sheet, making it a strong dividend stock candidate.
